title: Beille 48pk Silicone Zip Ties for Pantry Kitchen Organization Cooking Baking
description:
For food storage and pantry organization, Beille’s 48 pack of food grade silicone zip ties or twist ties can do it all and will prove to be a handy organizational tool to have around the house, especially in the kitchen! Whether closing a chip bag, keeping cereal fresh or looking to better seal a reusable produce bag in your fridge, these flexible and stretchy silicone zip ties are easy to use, easy to keep clean and can be put to use many times over in your kitchen or pantry. The twist ties, zip ties or straps are made of high-temperature resistant silicone, which means that they are completely safe to use when preparing food in the kitchen

Beille 48pk Silicone Zip Ties for Pantry Kitchen Organization Cooking Baking

For food storage and pantry organization, Beille’s 48 pack of food grade silicone zip ties or twist ties can do it all and will prove to be a handy organizational tool to have around the house, especially in the kitchen!

Key Features

  • KITCHEN ORGANIZATION TOOLS: Beille's 48pk of silicone zip ties will come in handy for kitchen organization and pantry storage and organization too! Whether closing a chip bag or keeping cereal fresh, these flexible but durable silicone zip ties are easy to use, keep clean and can be reused many times over
  • REUSABLE ZIP TIES: These silicone twist ties or straps can be put to use many times over in your kitchen or pantry, kids playroom, garage or home office for cable management! The zip ties are flexible and stretchy but also very durable, meaning they won't lose their elasticity or integrity
  • FOOD PREP AND COOKING: A unique aspect of these silicone twist ties is that they are completely food safe, meaning you can use these zip ties when cooking like when blanching vegetables or washing fresh produce and more
  • PANTRY ORGANIZATION AND STORAGE: These zip ties ensure you get the most out of pantry items keeping them fresher for longer! Look forward to a neat and tidy, organized kitchen and pantry, fridge, freezer and more utilizing these zip ties!
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 4.25 x 0.5 x 0.5 inches; Weight: 0.1lbs; Color: Assorted Multicolor; Material: Silicone

Product Specifications

  • MPN: 48BLE9478437
  • UPC: 810131706098
  • Color: Multicolor
  • Size: 4.25 in

Whether closing a chip bag, keeping cereal fresh or looking to better seal a reusable produce bag in your fridge, these flexible and stretchy silicone zip ties are easy to use, easy to keep clean and can be put to use many times over in your kitchen or pantry. The twist ties, zip ties or straps are made of high-temperature resistant silicone, which means that they are completely safe to use when preparing food in the kitchen. Even better, the multipurpose cable ties are reusable so you can use them to keep coffee fresh, blanch vegetables or better organize drawers, snack cupboards and more!

Our 48 pack tool set of reusable silicone zip ties will last long in to the future and make life more convenient and organized! However small or large your organizational project may be, be sure to have a pack of these twist ties on hand and you’ll be well on your way to a neat, tidy, clutter-free and organized kitchen, pantry and beyond!
